update.releaseNotes:
v5.6.2 - Changelog
New --- - Add `Trackblazer Item Conservation` section under the `Scenario Overrides Settings` page with thresholds for `Energy Item Reserve`, `Cupcake Reserve`, `Master Hammer Finale Reserve`, `Artisan Hammer Min Stock for G2 / G3`, `Glow Stick Final Reserve`, and `Glow Stick Min Fans`. - Add `Prioritize Near-Max Friendship` toggle to the `Training Settings` page that applies an anticipatory rainbow multiplier in Year 2+ when a training has green/blue friendship bars near orange. - Add `Training Level Weighting` toggle to the `Training Settings` page that detects each facility's training level (1-5) via OCR and amplifies the top three priority stats' scores accordingly. - Add `Disable Per-Distance Stat Targets` toggle to the `Training Settings` page that treats every stat's target as the scenario stat cap. - Add long-press on option labels across the settings pages to copy the option name to the clipboard. - Add Android ripple feedback to `Button`, `Select`, `AlertDialog`, `CustomCheckbox`, `CustomSelect`, and `CustomSlider` press surfaces. - Add `Decision Tracer` instrumentation that emits a structured `Decision Report` block at the end of every main-screen turn, summarizing trainee state, decision-relevant settings, the chosen action, rejected alternatives, training selection, and item usage.
Adjustments --- - Upgrade to `Expo SDK 56` and `React Native 0.85`, replace the deprecated `@expo/vector-icons` with `@react-native-vector-icons/ionicons`, and migrate to the new `expo-file-system` `File` and `Paths` API. - Gate `Trackblazer` race item conservation logic so it only kicks in from Turn 65 onward (right after Senior Year Summer training). Before that, the bot uses Hammers and Glow Sticks freely. - Ensure that `Royal Kale Juice` with a `Berry Sweet Cupcake` or `Plain Cupcake` in the same inventory can rescan again to use the cupcake after queuing the Kale Juice when you are already at GREAT mood. - Suppress the legacy extra-race fan-farming fallback when `Smart Race Solver` is enabled so the bot does not enter a race the solver did not plan. - Let `Smart Race Solver` override `Trackblazer`'s grade filter for `Pre-OP` races so a solver-planned Pre-OP race can actually execute. - Rest at critical energy with 3+ consecutive races even when a `Good-Luck Charm` is in inventory - the Charm only fires after `analyzeTrainings()` produces a selection with measured failure chance >= 20%, so it cannot protect the analysis itself. - Rename `Trackblazer Charm` and `Trackblazer Item Floor` settings to behavior-first names in the `Scenario Overrides Settings` page for clarity. - Group `Decision Report` inventory by category (Megaphones, Hammers, Energy, Cupcakes, etc.) and include `Trackblazer` race items.
Fixes --- - Fix bug where per-distance strategy was falling back to the blanket strategy on mandatory races. - Fix bug where `Smart Race Solver` ignored manual race locks at runtime and that locked races are not bundled into the schedule regeneration after a race loss.
